emails.subject: Re: Foreign legal counsel
emails.body: Frank: Have you ever hired New Guinea counsel? I need to engage a firm to answer derivatives issues. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 05/16/2000 10:13 AM Rob Walls@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 05/16/2000 08:58 AM

emails.subject: Re: Foreign legal counsel
emails.body: Sara Yes we have. It's been a while since I used them, but let me see if I can pull the name up for you . I'll get back to you ASAP. From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 05/16/2000 10:15 AM

emails.subject: Re: Foreign legal counsel
emails.body: Frank: Have you had any luck? Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 05/19/2000 04:00 PM Frank Sayre@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 05/17/2000 10:50 AM
